setup.title: Welcome to WebCode
setup.subtitle: Complete the base setup and confirm cc-switch is ready before first use.
setup.completedDesc: Initialization is finished. Switch CLI providers in cc-switch from now on.
setup.enableAuthDesc: When enabled, users must sign in before using the system.
setup.workspaceRootDesc: Directory used for session workspaces. For Docker deployments, keeping the default {path} is recommended.
setup.selectAssistantsDesc: Choose the assistants you want to use in WebCode. Provider activation and switching must happen in cc-switch; WebCode only reads the current live state.
setup.claudeCodeDesc: Use the currently active Claude Code provider and live config from cc-switch
setup.codexDesc: Use the currently active Codex provider and live config from cc-switch
setup.openCodeDesc: Use the currently active OpenCode provider and live config from cc-switch
setup.ccSwitchReviewTitle: Confirm runtime status before completing setup
setup.ccSwitchReviewDesc: WebCode no longer syncs or caches provider configuration. It reads the live config from the currently active cc-switch provider at runtime.
setup.ccSwitchRequirement: cc-switch must exist and have a ready provider for every selected assistant.
setup.ccSwitchDetected: cc-switch was detected. You can continue reviewing tool readiness.
setup.ccSwitchMissing: No usable cc-switch installation was detected. Managed tools cannot launch until it is fixed.
setup.noAssistantsSelectedDesc: You can still finish initialization. Enable assistants later only after cc-switch is ready for them.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
validation.assistantsNotReady: One or more selected assistants are not ready in cc-switch.
